section.div: 🕷️ An adaptive Web Scraping framework that handles everything from a single request to a full-scale crawl!

A lightweight alternative to OpenClaw that runs in containers for security. Connects to WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, Discord, Gmail and other messaging apps,, has memory, scheduled jobs, and runs directly on Anthropic's Agents SDK
NyameBox, The Original NekoBox Rebranded, the cross-platform Qt proxy utility, empowered by sing-box and thrift
Train your AI self, amplify you, bridge the world
